    - Schedule the next meeting for June 1, 2024.

args.subject: Summary of the client meeting
args.body:
Dear John,

I hope this message finds you well.

Please find attached the minutes from our recent meeting on May 5, 2024. Here's a quick summary of what was discussed:

- We reviewed and discussed the client’s requirements for the new project.
- Agreed upon the project timeline and key milestones.
- Initial design concepts were reviewed, and valuable feedback was gathered from your team.

Action items were assigned as follows:
- I will update the project plan based on the feedback received.
- David will coordinate with the development team to initiate the project’s initial phase.

Kindly note that our next meeting is scheduled for June 1, 2024.

Please feel free to reach out should you have any questions or need further clarification.

Best regards,

Emma Johnson
Blue Sparrow Tech
